privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at `/home/ga/eclipse-workspace/DataProcessor/src/com/dataprocessor`. There are 5 Java files involved: `ProcessingException.java` (the base exception class), `FileProcessor.java`, `DatabaseConnector.java`, `ConfigParser.java`, and `App.java`. The environment uses Eclipse 2024-12 and OpenJDK 17. Exception chaining requires passing the caught exception 'e' as a parameter to the new exception, e.g., `throw new ProcessingException("Error message", e);`. Try-with-resources requires declaring the resource inside the parentheses of the try statement: `try (Resource r = new Resource()) { ... }`.
